universe._comment: Reusable price/ADV/option-liquidity filter (universe.py). The forward thematic-convexity strategy is hand-seeded via themes.json; the thematic seed map below is vestigial from the shelved divergence edge and is not read by the paper loop.

eligibility._comment: Live option-tradability floor (universe.check_eligibility mode='live'). The convexity loop also runs options_tradability.py for the per-contract bid/ask + OI gate (PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §3).

convexity_book._comment: Frozen risk frame — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §5. Operator decisions 2026-05-31. account_equity is a paper nominal until a broker supplies it.

convexity_gate._comment: Frozen IV/cheap-convexity gate — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §4. No historical IV exists (forward-only chains) → cheapness is measured vs the underlying's trailing realized vol (from bars) + the live skew shape. Thresholds changed only by documented operator edit, never to justify a trade.

convexity_exits._comment: Frozen L2 exit rules — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6a. Deterministic, no LLM (the fast reflex, SPEC §3). profit_take_multiple: close when the mark reaches N× the entry premium. time_stop_dte: close when ≤ N calendar days to expiry (avoid the gamma/theta endgame). Otherwise hold to expiry (venture style → most expire worthless = −premium). profit_take_multiple RAISED 4.0→10.0 on 2026-06-01 (operator-authorized, calibration-cited — see PREREG §6a): 4× clipped the convex tail (p99 ~4.5× vs ~10× uncapped) at ~0 cost to the mean.

kill_rule._comment: Frozen — PREREG_THEMATIC_CONVEXITY §6. Halts NEW entries (not force-close) on either condition. The KILL file/env switch is always-on, separately, every cycle.

execution._comment: Real Alpaca paper order path (broker.AlpacaPaperBroker). SENDING is gated by safety.dry_run: dry_run=true (default) logs the intended order + simulates the fill — nothing is transmitted; dry_run=false actually submits to the PAPER endpoint. cancel_unfilled: at reconcile, cancel a still-resting limit (it re-evaluates next cycle) instead of leaving it open.
